languages.text: "Эоганн не может признать твоего очевидного превосходства. Возможно преподнесенный дар плоти может компенсировать его невежество?"
"Eogunn cannot acknowledge your obvious superiority. Perhaps a gift of flesh might compensate for his ignorance?"
languages.original_text: "Эоганн не может признать твоего очевидного превосходства. Возможно преподнесенный дар плоти может компенсировать его невежество?"

languages.text: "Eogunn kann Eure offensichtliche Überlegenheit nicht anerkennen. Könnte vielleicht ein Geschenk aus Fleisch seine Ignoranz kompensieren?"
languages.original_text: "Eogunn cannot acknowledge your obvious superiority. Perhaps a gift of flesh might compensate for his ignorance?"

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn kann Eure offensichtliche Überlegenheit nicht anerkennen. Könnte vielleicht ein Geschenk aus Fleisch seine Ignoranz kompensieren?"

languages.text: « Eogunn est manifestement incapable de reconnaître votre supériorité pourtant évidente. Mais peut-être que ce don de chair pourrait compenser son ignorance ? »
languages.original_text: "Eogunn cannot acknowledge your obvious superiority. Perhaps a gift of flesh might compensate for his ignorance?"

traits.locale_text: « Eogunn est manifestement incapable de reconnaître votre supériorité pourtant évidente. Mais peut-être que ce don de chair pourrait compenser son ignorance ? »

languages.text: «Eogunn no puede admitir tu evidente superioridad. ¿Crees que un regalo de carne puede compensarte por su ignorancia?».
languages.original_text: "Eogunn cannot acknowledge your obvious superiority. Perhaps a gift of flesh might compensate for his ignorance?"

traits.locale_text: «Eogunn no puede admitir tu evidente superioridad. ¿Crees que un regalo de carne puede compensarte por su ignorancia?».

languages.text: "Eogunn bariz üstünlüğünü kabul edemez. Bir et hediyesiyle onun cehaletini telafi etsek nasıl olur?"
languages.original_text: "Eogunn cannot acknowledge your obvious superiority. Perhaps a gift of flesh might compensate for his ignorance?"

traits.locale_text: "Eogunn bariz üstünlüğünü kabul edemez. Bir et hediyesiyle onun cehaletini telafi etsek nasıl olur?"

languages.text: “伊奥贡不肯承认你比他高明。也许该送点血肉之礼，来治治他的有眼无珠？”
languages.original_text: "Eogunn cannot acknowledge your obvious superiority. Perhaps a gift of flesh might compensate for his ignorance?"

traits.locale_text: “伊奥贡不肯承认你比他高明。也许该送点血肉之礼，来治治他的有眼无珠？”

languages.text: 「エオグンはあなたの明らかな優位性を認めることはできません。彼の無知を補うために、肉を贈ることはできないでしょうか？」
languages.original_text: "Eogunn cannot acknowledge your obvious superiority. Perhaps a gift of flesh might compensate for his ignorance?"

traits.locale_text: 「エオグンはあなたの明らかな優位性を認めることはできません。彼の無知を補うために、肉を贈ることはできないでしょうか？」
